howItWorks.intro: This insulation r-value calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Additional R-Value
rules.explanation: The gap between what you have and what is recommended.

howItWorks.outro: Energy costs and incentives change by region and season. Check with your local utility for current rates.

faq.a: Depends on climate zone and location in home. Attics need R-30 to R-60.
A measure of thermal resistance. Higher R-value = better insulation.
